name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
instructions: Set an adjustable bench to about 30–45°. Lie face down on the bench with your chin off the top. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, arms hanging straight down. Pull the dumbbells to your sides by driving your elbows back, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower them back to the start with control.
form_cues: Chest stays pressed against the bench
Don't shrug — pull with your back
safety_notes: This exercise removes almost all lower back stress, making it ideal for those with back issues. Keep your neck neutral. If you feel discomfort in the chest from the bench, place a folded towel under your chest.
common_mistakes: Not fully squeezing at the top
